title: Coriander Fry Pancakes
description: Nutty and fluffy Coriander Fry Pancakes that are perfect for a brunch mood in the Irish style, featuring diabetic-friendly friendly options.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
In a large bowl, combine flour and brown sugar. Stir in milk and eggs until well mixed.
Add vanilla extract and pumpkin puree to the mixture; stir until smooth but not too runny.
Stir in crushed coriander seeds for added texture and flavor.
Pour batter into the heated pan by using a 1/4 cup measuring cup. Cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side or until bubbles form on top and the bottom is golden brown.
Serve hot with a drizzle of honey or maple syrup if desired.
